title: Post-16 technical qualifications
body: " This guidance has been transferred from the previous skills body the Institute for Apprenticeships and Technical Education (IfATE) following its closure on 31 May 2025. The guidance is under review and may be subject to change.   How Skills England approves post-16 technical qualifications in the categories of:   occupational-entry technical qualifications for 16 to 19 and adults occupational-entry technical qualifications for adults only additional specialist technical qualifications for 16 to 19 and adults   This includes:   submission requirements how we apply the tests employer engagement content coverage and mapping assessment   "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
